headline: Intel Shares Surge After BofA Upgrades Stock to Buy on CPU and Foundry Growth Prospects (INTC)
summary: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) shares rose about 5% in premarket trading after Bank of America upgraded the stock twice, moving its rating from Underperform to Buy and increasing its price target to $135 from $96. The investment bank cited improving visibility around Intel’s server processor business and expanding opportunities within its external foundry operations as key reasons for the more optimistic outlook.

content.title: Intel Shares Surge After BofA Upgrades Stock to Buy on CPU and Foundry Growth Prospects (INTC)
content.summary: Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) shares rose about 5% in premarket trading after Bank of America upgraded the stock twice, moving its rating from Underperform to Buy and increasing its price target to $135 from $96. The investment bank cited improving visibility around Intel’s server processor business and expanding opportunities within its external foundry operations as key reasons for the more optimistic outlook.

headline: BofA lifts targets on AMD and ARM, raises CPU TAM to $170bn
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America has raised its 2030 server CPU total addressable market estimate to more than $170 billion from $125 billion, arguing that agentic AI is driving a near-fivefold expansion in CPU demand and lifting price objectives across several semiconductor names.

headline: Citigroup, IBD's Stock Of The Day, Flirts With Buy Point As Growth Sharply Accelerates
summary: Citigroup is IBD's Stock Of The Day as it makes a blockchain move while executing on a massive turnaround that has sharply boosted profitability.  On Thursday, the Wall Street Journal confirmed earlier reports about Citigroup rolling out tokenized shares of private companies for its wealthy and institutional clients.  Basically, that means Citi will use a blockchain-based platform to convert equity in pre-IPO private companies into digital tokens.

content.title: Citigroup, IBD's Stock Of The Day, Flirts With Buy Point As Growth Sharply Accelerates
content.summary: Citigroup is IBD's Stock Of The Day as it makes a blockchain move while executing on a massive turnaround that has sharply boosted profitability. Basically, that means Citi will use a blockchain-based platform to convert equity in pre-IPO private companies into digital tokens.

headline: Why Is Intel (INTC) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of computer processor maker Intel (NASDAQ:INTC) jumped 5.1% in the morning session after Bank of America issued a rare double upgrade that gave sell-side backing to the foundry story investors had been bidding up.
